source_rationale: RGS5 is a canonical marker of pericytes and vascular mural cells, highly expressed in this cluster
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a key marker of pericytes and smooth muscle cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle marker gene consistent with pericyte/vascular smooth muscle identity
PDGFRB is a definitive pericyte marker receptor essential for pericyte recruitment and signaling
NOTCH3 is a key signaling receptor in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
MYH11 (smooth muscle myosin heavy chain) marks contractile smooth muscle/pericyte identity
MCAM (CD146) is a well-established pericyte surface marker
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells and pericytes regulating calcium signaling
CSPG4 (NG2) is a classical pericyte marker proteoglycan
GJA4 (Connexin 37) is expressed in vascular mural cells mediating gap junction communication
CD3D is a core T cell receptor complex component marking T lymphocytes
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes, indicating a CD8+ T cell identity
Granzyme K is characteristic of effector memory CD8+ T cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by activated/effector T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in activated T and NK cells
Granzyme A is a serine protease in cytotoxic T lymphocyte granules
CD3E is part of the TCR complex confirming T cell lineage
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker confirming immune cell identity
Interferon gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated CD8+ T cells
Perforin is a cytolytic protein specific to cytotoxic T and NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic T and NK cells
Decorin is a hallmark extracellular matrix proteoglycan of fibroblasts/stromal cells
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell marker receptor
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major extracellular matrix gene produced by fibroblasts
Collagen type I alpha 2 chain is a fibroblast-produced structural protein
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed by ovarian stromal fibroblasts
FOXL2 is a transcription factor critical for ovarian granulosa/stromal cell identity
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian stromal/theca cells
StAR (steroidogenic acute regulatory protein) indicates steroidogenic stromal cell function
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of fibroblasts remodeling ECM
Osteoglycin is an ECM proteoglycan enriched in stromal fibroblasts
Von Willebrand factor is a definitive endothelial cell marker
Claudin 5 is a tight junction protein specific to vascular endothelial cells
VE-cadherin (CDH5) is a canonical endothelial cell-specific adhesion molecule
CD34 is a sialomucin expressed on vascular endothelial cells
KDR (VEGFR2) is the primary VEGF receptor on endothelial cells
ERG is an ETS transcription factor essential for endothelial cell identity
Endomucin is a sialomucin specifically expressed on vascular endothelial cells
FLT1 (VEGFR1) is a VEGF receptor marking endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor involved in vascular development
ICAM2 is constitutively expressed on endothelial cells
Anti-Müllerian hormone is produced by granulosa cells of growing ovarian follicles
FOXL2 is the master transcription factor for ovarian granulosa cell differentiation
Inhibin alpha is a granulosa cell-specific hormone subunit
HSD17B1 is a steroidogenic enzyme active in granulosa cells for estrogen synthesis
WFDC2 (HE4) is expressed in ovarian epithelial and granulosa cells
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells
Follistatin is a granulosa cell product that antagonizes activin signaling
Prostaglandin D synthase is highly expressed in ovarian granulosa cells
Desmoplakin marks epithelial-like granulosa cells with cell-cell junctions
AMH receptor type 2 is specifically expressed on granulosa cells
WT1 is a transcription factor expressed in ovarian granulosa cells
CD14 is a monocyte/macrophage lineage marker for innate immune cells
Complement C1q subunit marks tissue-resident macrophages
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein in myeloid/NK cell signaling
AIF1 (IBA1) is a macrophage/microglia-specific calcium-binding protein
Lysozyme is a classic monocyte/macrophage marker enzyme
Fc epsilon receptor gamma chain is expressed on myeloid cells
CD3D co-expression with myeloid markers suggests a mixed immune cluster with T cell component
CCL3 (MIP-1alpha) is a chemokine produced by activated macrophages and T cells
FCER1A marks dendritic cells and mast cells in the myeloid compartment
SPI1 (PU.1) is a master transcription factor for myeloid cell differentiation
CD163 is a scavenger receptor specific to tissue-resident macrophages
C1QA marks complement-expressing tissue-resident macrophages
C1QB is part of the complement C1q complex characteristic of resident macrophages
CSF1R (CD115) is the macrophage colony-stimulating factor receptor
LYVE1 marks tissue-resident macrophages with perivascular/lymphatic association
FOLR2 is a marker of tissue-resident anti-inflammatory macrophages
Mannose receptor family member marks M2-like tissue macrophages
MAFB is a transcription factor driving macrophage differentiation
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein characteristic of macrophage lineage
Stabilin-1 is a scavenger receptor on tissue-resident macrophages
Coagulation factor XIII A marks tissue-resident macrophages
MERTK is a receptor tyrosine kinase for efferocytosis in tissue macrophages
Zona pellucida glycoprotein 3 is an oocyte-specific structural protein
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
DPPA3 (Stella) is a germ cell-specific gene marking oocytes
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
LHX8 is a transcription factor essential for oocyte survival and development
SYCP3 is a synaptonemal complex protein marking meiotic germ cells/oocytes
SOHLH2 is a germ cell-specific transcription factor for oogenesis
TUBB8 is an oocyte-specific beta-tubulin required for meiotic spindle formation
ZAR1 is a zygote arrest factor specifically expressed in oocytes
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte chromosome segregation
KPNA7 is an oocyte-specific importin alpha family member
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell marker with highest logFC
Alpha smooth muscle actin marks pericytes and smooth muscle cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte cytoskeletal marker
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain indicates mature smooth muscle/pericyte identity
NOTCH3 signaling is critical for pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell specification
PDGFRB is a definitive pericyte surface receptor
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker
Calponin 1 is a smooth muscle-specific contractile protein
Myosin light chain 9 is enriched in smooth muscle/pericyte contractile apparatus
Caldesmon is a smooth muscle contractile regulatory protein distinguishing this cluster
Decorin is a fibroblast/stromal cell ECM proteoglycan with highest expression
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell receptor
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major fibroblast-produced ECM component
StAR marks steroidogenic stromal/theca cells in the ovary
TCF21 is a stromal/theca cell transcription factor in the ovary
Osteoglycin is an ECM proteoglycan enriched in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
FOXL2 is essential for ovarian somatic cell identity and differentiation
Claudin 11 marks ovarian stromal cells with tight junction formation
Complement factor D (adipsin) is expressed by adipocyte-like stromal cells
Lumican is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
